title: Furnace Heart
pitch: HP is fuel: everything you do burns heat, and every fuel you loot burns on its own curve.
howto: Keep your furnace-golem's fire alive through enemy waves. Kills drop coal, wood, oil and shards - each with a different burn curve you can read before you feed it. Too cold you shut down, too hot the boiler cracks; grind slag for engine parts like bigger hoppers and heat exchangers.
controls: Drag to move. Tap fuel chips to feed the furnace. Tap VENT to blast excess heat.
